replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: Greetings to Canada! We hope you're enjoying the video. 😊

comments.author: @AmazingDiscoveriesTopUS
comments.text: Thailand is famous for whild nightlife... but 90% of the  population is Buddhist. Which side is the "real"Thai Land?

comments.author: @RealLifeFilesDoc
comments.text: The cultural research in this documentary is outstanding. Breaking down the Thai smile into a language of "Kreng Jai" (the reluctance to impose) [05:10] rather than just pure happiness is a nuance most travel videos completely miss. Coupling that with the philosophy of "Mai Pen Rai" as a way to hold the world more loosely [10:42] really explains how a country with such wild, contrasting day and night lives can remain so profoundly peaceful and safe. 10/10 scriptwriting! 👏
